publishedAbstract: - When deploying OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) using the Local Storage Operator (LSO) on VMware vSphere, some worker nodes fail to have Persistent Volumes (PVs) created, despite being correctly labeled. Consequently, when attempting to create a StorageSystem or StorageCluster, only a subset of the expected nodes (e.g., 3 out of 5) are available.- The diskmaker-manager logs on the affected nodes show the following entry: ~~~ reconcile.go:270] "match negative" device="sdb" filter="inMechanicalPropertyList ~~~
publishedTitle: LocalVolumeSet fails to match disks on some VMware nodes with "match negative" "inMechanicalPropertyList"
